typography.strategy: The 'Editorial Future' - Wide Display Sans + Clean Geometric Body. Designed for a premium global brand feel, escaping the 'generic ecommerce' slop.

english.headings: Cabinet Grotesk or Clash Display (font-black or font-light for extreme contrast)

arabic.body: IBM Plex Sans Arabic or Noto Kufi Arabic

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl+ tracking-tighter leading-none (Never use 7xl+ for hero)

rtl_guidelines.direction: Full RTL/LTR mirroring using HTML `dir` attribute toggle (e.g. `dir='rtl' lang='ar'`).
rtl_guidelines.css_properties: CRITICAL: Do NOT use absolute left/right. Use CSS logical properties: `ms-` (margin-inline-start), `pe-` (padding-inline-end), `text-start`, `text-end`, `border-s`, `inset-inline-start`.
rtl_guidelines.icons: Mirror direction-based icons (arrows, chevrons, sliders, progress bars). Do NOT mirror logos, media control icons, or neutral symbols.
rtl_guidelines.alignment: Arabic text aligns right (logical start), English aligns left (logical start). Keep numbers LTR even in RTL contexts.

visual_enhancers.surfaces: Use 'Glassmorphism (The Crystal Variant)' for the sticky header (bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10). Use 'Neumorphism / Clay & Crisp' for dashboard/review cards (1px subtle border, flat background).
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle grain or noise overlays to give a tactile, high-end 'marble' or 'museum-like' feel. Products emerge from darkness like gallery art.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px delicate inner strokes (border-white/10) to separate surfaces from backgrounds.
visual_enhancers.hero_overlay: Max overlay opacity bg-black/50 for hero background image readability. Prefer gradient overlay for text contrast.

components.header: Sticky glassmorphic nav (`backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60`). Must include brand logo, language toggle (EN/AR), links, and CTA. Never transparent without blur.
components.hero: Asymmetric layout. Editorial text on one side, floating marble mousepad product on the other. Dual CTAs (Shop Now -> external Salla link, Explore).
components.product_showcase: Curated museum-like display for 3 products: Grey Marble, White Marble, Dark Marble. Hover reveals (framer-motion). CTAs point to Salla store. Do NOT use standard Shadcn cards; build custom asymmetric rectangular HTML structures.
components.reviews: Custom review carousel. Star ratings, user setups (images). Use `lucide-react` or `phosphor-icons` for stars.
components.faq: Shadcn Accordion component, customized with dark luxury aesthetic (1px borders, white hover text).
components.stats_counter: Minimalist bento-style numerical counters (Customers, Orders, Avg Rating) using tracking-tight large typography.
components.newsletter: Shadcn Form/Input. Sleek single-line input with a premium 'Subscribe' button (white background, black text).
components.floating_contact: Fixed WhatsApp icon at the bottom edge. Respects RTL placement (bottom-left in LTR, bottom-right in RTL).

layouts.spacing: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use `py-24` to `py-32` between sections. Containers must have internal padding (`p-8`).
layouts.grid_strategy: The 'Bento' Grid Protocol (Mode A: Tetris) for 'Why Us' / Features. `gap-8` to `gap-12`. Asymmetric spans (`col-span-8` next to `col-span-4`).
layouts.mobile: Mobile-first responsive. Images max-h-[80vh] on mobile. Hamburgers only on mobile.

motion.scrolling: Implement `lenis` for smooth premium scrolling momentum.
motion.animations: Micro-interactions on hover (opacity shifts, slight scale-ups `hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-500`). Staggered entrance animations for bento grids.
motion.hover_states: ALWAYS explicitly set text color on hover. `hover:bg-white hover:text-black`.

accessibility.contrast: Minimum 4.5:1 for text. Text shadows required over images.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='hero-shop-button'`).

media.icons: Use `lucide-react` (installed) or `@phosphor-icons/react` (for premium duotone). Provide install commands if needed.
media.images: Use border-radius `rounded-2xl` for lifestyle imagery, completely flat/sharp edges `rounded-none` for product precision.

hero_background.description: Black marble with white veins texture - perfect for high-end cinematic hero background overlay

product_dark_marble.description: Dark Marble Texture close-up to represent the Dark Marble mousepad product visual

product_white_marble.description: White marble texture close-up for the White Marble mousepad product visual

product_grey_marble.description: Grey/Black and white marble texture for Grey Marble mousepad product visual

lifestyle_setup_1.description: Premium monitor on desk - Use for 'Why Us' or community testimonials gallery

lifestyle_setup_2.description: Black flat screen computer desk setup - Use for community / user setup gallery

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a JavaScript project (.js/.jsx), DO NOT output TypeScript (.ts/.tsx).
Build a context provider or global state for AR/EN toggle. Attach `dir='rtl'` to the `html` or `body` element when Arabic is active.
Translate major hardcoded strings (Hero text, Shop Now, Explore, etc.) into both English and Arabic. Toggle them based on state.
Do not use generic Shadcn Cards for the primary product showcase. Build custom HTML/Tailwind asymmetrical rectangular layouts.
Product 'Shop Now' buttons should be external `<a>` tags pointing to the existing Salla store.
Integrate a reviews section showcasing 5-star feedback, with a 'Submit Review' form using Shadcn Input/Textarea elements.
Maintain the highest level of premium dark aesthetic: rely on #0A0A0A, pure white text, silver accents, and noise/grain overlays.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., `transition: all`). Always add transitions for specific interactive elements.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in CSS.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute.
Missing image categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN. Only use provided URLs.
